Fact Sheet on The President’s Emergency Plan for AIDS Relief (PEPFAR) Blueprint: Creating an AIDS-free Generation: http://t.co/ju2VYtCt
Stay tuned to http://t.co/UKm9plIx for transcript and video of #SecClinton’s remarks "U.S. and #Europe: A Revitalized Global Partnership"
#SecClinton: If we work together, I’m confident that the US and #Europe are up to the challenge.
#SecClinton: The US and #EU must continue to assist civil society, support democratic reforms, and promote tolerance.
#SecClinton:  #Europe is already the US’s largest trade and investment partner. http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: There’s a great deal more on the economic front the U.S. and #Europe must be doing together, like tackling global imbalances.
#SecClinton: There may be no greater threat to our security – and #transatlantic partnership – than a weak economic future.
#SecClinton: We have to realize the untapped potential of the #transatlantic market, is as much a strategic imperative as an economic one.
#SecClinton: On a wide range of global security issues, we’re more closely aligned with our European partners than we’ve ever been.
#SecClinton: US and European leaders are pushing Tehran to live up to its international obligations; abandon its pursuit of nuclear weapons.
#SecClinton: The window for Iran to negotiate seriously is not open indefinitely.
#SecClinton: The US is determined to prevent #Iran from acquiring a #nuclear weapon.  Diplomacy is our preferred approach.
#SecClinton: Today, few would argue that #Iran’s #nuclear ambitions are anything less than a grave threat to its neighbors and the world.
#SecClinton: Together, the US and #Europe are helping the Afghans take back their country and secure their future.  #NATO #Afghanistan
#SecClinton: Next week, I’ll make my 38th visit to #Europe as #SecState.  It demonstrates the commitment to our #transatlantic partnership.
#SecClinton: History, ties, and values make us natural partners in advancing our interests both within #Europe and throughout the world.
#SecClinton: In the democracies of Europe, we find countries with shared strategic interests, with whom we share a long history.
Live Now! #SecClinton delivers remarks on the U.S. and #Europe: A Revitalized Global Partnership. Watch: http://t.co/UKm9plIx

Presidential Proclamation -- World AIDS Day, 2012: http://t.co/2CJEMmfu - via @WhiteHouse
Stay tuned to http://t.co/UKm9plIx for transcript and video of the #WorldAIDSDay remarks.  Read the #PEPFARBlueprint at http://t.co/eoYS6qmA
#SecClinton: Think of the joy rippling out across a generation whose children will be born free of this disease, not know the horror of AIDS
#SecClinton: We will promote a global effort to achieve an AIDS-free generation. This is a shared responsibility #WorldAIDSDay
#SecClinton: The #PEPFARblueprint lays out goals and the many specific steps we’ll take to accomplish them. #WorldAIDSDay
#SecClinton: In the fight against #HIV/AIDS, failing to live up to our commitments isn’t just disappointing; it is deadly. #PEPFARblueprint
#SecClinton: We will get ahead of the pandemic, and an AIDS-free generation will be in sight.  #WorldAIDSDay #PEPFARblueprint
#SecClinton: According to @UNAIDS, the rate of new HIV infections has dropped by more than half in 25 countries over the past decade
#SecClinton: By applying evidence-based strategies in most effective combinations, we have cut the number of new HIV infections dramatically
#SecClinton: #HIV may be with us well into the future, but the disease that it causes need not be. #PEPFARblueprint #WorldAIDSDay
Live now on http://t.co/UKm9plIx: #SecClinton marking #WorldAIDSDay and unveiling the #PEPFARblueprint
#SecClinton to mark #WorldAIDSDay and unveil the #PEPFARblueprint at 10:30 AM ET today. Watch live at http://t.co/UKm9plIx

#SecClinton: When #LGBT people are persecuted, or kept from fully participating in their societies, they suffer.  But so do we.
#SecClinton: We need a diplomatic corps that is as diverse as the world we work in. #LGBT   http://t.co/UKm9plIx
#SecClinton: As your #SecState, creating a #LGBT-welcoming workplace isn’t just the right thing to do; it’s the smart thing to do.
#SecClinton: Our people should not have to choose between serving the country they love and sharing a life with the people they love. #LGBT
#SecClinton: Over the past four years, we’ve worked to welcome #LGBT people into the @StateDept family and other agencies.

#SecClinton: Thank you to all our nominees and every U.S. company that is doing well by doing good all around the world.
#SecClinton: @Intel Vietnam is partnering with @USAID and @ASU to help Vietnamese universities improve science, engineering programs.
#SecClinton: @Intel’s Vietnam office is a national leader in promoting education, sustainable development, and empowering women.
#SecClinton: The winner of the Award for Corporate Excellence in the large business category is @Intel’s office in #Vietnam.
#SecClinton: Sorwathé is an environmental leader, a pioneer on workers’ rights, and is reaching into the local community.
#SecClinton: Winner in small, medium category is Tea Importers, Inc., whose joint venture, Sorwathé, is top single producer of tea in Rwanda
#SecClinton: It is critically important for the interests of our foreign policy for American companies abroad to operate responsibly.
#SecClinton: Many businesses have positive story to tell- about delivering lifesaving medicines, standing up for human rights, creating jobs
